sets.passage: Campus Bike Room Notice: Starting Monday, all bicycles left in the east storage room must display a current residence sticker. Unlabeled bicycles will be moved to the security office after Friday.

questions.prompt: What should students do before Friday?
options: Put a residence sticker on their bicycle
Move every bicycle to the east room
Pay a fee at the security office
questions.answer: Put a residence sticker on their bicycle

questions.prompt: What will happen to bicycles without labels?
options: They will be repaired by residence staff
They will be moved to the security office
They will be sold to new students
They will remain in the east room all month
questions.answer: They will be moved to the security office

sets.explain_zh: 通知要求东侧自行车房的自行车贴住宿标签；未贴标签的车周五后会被移到保安办公室。

sets.passage: Message from Mina: I left the lab early because the printer stopped working. Could you please email Professor Rao the final chart? The file is named soil-results-final.

questions.prompt: Why did Mina leave the lab early?
What does Mina ask the reader to send?

sets.explain_zh: 短信说明 Mina 因打印机故障提前离开，并请对方发送 final chart。

sets.passage: Library Workshop: Avoiding Plagiarism, Room 214, 3:00-3:45 p.m. Bring one paragraph from your current paper. Seats are limited to twenty students.

questions.prompt: What should students bring to the workshop?
What is implied about the workshop?
options: It is only for graduate students

questions.prompt: What topic will the workshop cover?

sets.explain_zh: workshop 主题是避免抄袭，要求带当前论文的一段，并且名额有限。

sets.passage: Café Menu Update: The soup counter now closes at 2:30 p.m. on Fridays. Sandwiches, fruit cups, and bottled drinks remain available until 5:00 p.m.

questions.prompt: What changes on Fridays?
options: Sandwiches are moved to another building

questions.prompt: Which item can students still buy after 2:30 p.m.?

sets.explain_zh: 菜单更新只改变周五汤品柜台时间，三明治、水果杯和饮料仍供应到下午五点。

sets.passage: Course Site Alert: Tonight's biology quiz will open at 8:00 p.m. instead of 7:00 p.m. because several diagrams are being replaced with clearer versions.

questions.prompt: Why will the quiz open later?
When will the quiz open?

sets.explain_zh: 题目开放时间推迟到 8 点，原因是图表正在替换为更清晰版本。

sets.passage: Volunteer Schedule: The garden team meets behind the student center at 9:15. If it rains, meet inside the greenhouse instead. Gloves will be provided.

questions.prompt: Where should volunteers go if it rains?
What will volunteers receive?
What is the purpose of the message?
options: To explain where and when to meet
To invite students to a lecture
questions.answer: To explain where and when to meet

sets.explain_zh: 志愿者通知说明集合时间地点、雨天备用地点和提供手套。

sets.passage: Email from Housing: Your room-change request was received. You will get a decision after both roommates complete the online confirmation form.

questions.prompt: What must happen before a decision is made?
options: Both roommates must submit a form
The student must visit the housing office
A new room must be painted
The student must pay a deposit
questions.answer: Both roommates must submit a form

questions.prompt: What is the email mainly about?
options: The status of a room-change request
questions.answer: The status of a room-change request

sets.explain_zh: 邮件确认换房申请已收到，但需要两位室友都完成确认表后才会有决定。

sets.passage: Museum Club Post: Saturday's visit has been moved to the city history museum because the art museum is installing a new lighting system. Tickets already purchased are still valid.

questions.prompt: Why was the destination changed?
options: The art museum is installing new lighting
The city history museum offered free tickets
The club bought the wrong tickets
questions.answer: The art museum is installing new lighting

questions.prompt: What does the post say about tickets?
options: Purchased tickets can still be used
Students need to buy new tickets
questions.answer: Purchased tickets can still be used

questions.prompt: What is the post mainly doing?

sets.explain_zh: 社团帖子通知参观地点变更，原因是美术馆安装灯光；已购票仍有效。

sets.passage: Bookstore Label: Used copies may contain notes in the margins. They can be returned within seven days only if the access code envelope is unopened.

questions.prompt: What might be found in used copies?
When can a used copy be returned?
options: When the access code envelope is unopened
After the access code is used
Whenever the book has margin notes
questions.answer: When the access code envelope is unopened

sets.explain_zh: 二手书可能有页边笔记；退货条件是七天内且 access code 信封未开。

sets.passage: Advisor Note: Please bring your degree checklist to Tuesday's appointment. We will compare it with next semester's course list before you register.

questions.prompt: What should the student bring?
What will happen during the appointment?
options: The checklist will be compared with course options
The student will take a placement test
The student will move to a new dorm
questions.answer: The checklist will be compared with course options

questions.prompt: Why is the appointment probably scheduled before registration?
options: To help the student choose appropriate courses
To check the student's library account
questions.answer: To help the student choose appropriate courses

sets.explain_zh: 导师便条要求学生带 degree checklist，并在选课前与下学期课程列表对照。
